name: codex-coordinator
description: Coordinate parallel Codex tasks in one shared checkout with a small active-only boundary board.

interface.shortDescription: Keep parallel Codex tasks from crossing wires
interface.longDescription: When asked, a goal-scoped Coordinator reuses suitable related local tasks before assigning complete Codex task lanes in the current shared checkout. Each writer publishes only its active goal, planned paths, and narrow exclusive actions so overlap is visible without an always-on manager, task-level path locks, durable Git owner, heartbeat, transcript mirror, extra worktree, or required pull-request workflow.
defaultPrompt: Reuse related local tasks to coordinate this goal in the current shared checkout
Show the active task boundaries in this repository
Claim this task's bounded paths before making changes
